title: Let it (as option) work like a 20 year old (not smart)-phone for elderly poeple
author: starbrights
body:
I tried to set it up for my grandma, but failed. For older people already the touch with no real feedback by physical buttons is a challenge. Everything else should be as close as possible work like a 20 years old (dumb)phone - with options for more. But it should be possible to strip it down.

My point is: The great looking launcher is not fenced completely to make it work.
A few examples:
* The volume settings (by keys) should be fixed, so that is not easy to change that unintended
* In the most limited application (phone) there are just needed the first 3 icons. Would be great to have just this 3 (as an option)
* My moto G34 makes it almost impossible to switch device off. Even myself has to check for a tutorial - there should be a way by workaround that.
* I would like to have an option to neither make it required nor possible to swipe to another page or swipe down/up from lower/upper status bar.
* My grandma wants to have it's landline: There is no option to include at least incoming VoIP calls seamless to the caller app.
*  The middle 6 icons leads to other apps - installed or not, that brakes the look and feel completely. That should be avoided or (as above mentioned) possible to opt out.

Although I do have some points here it looks promising so far. Please go on! Thanks for your great work so far, and maybe next I can handover a new phone to my grandma.

title: Error starting camera on GrapheneOS: "Unable to find explicit activity class"
author: jonfre
body:
**Describe the bug**
An error occures when starting the camera on GrapheneOS:
_Unable to find explicit activity class {app.grapheneos.camera/app.grapheneos.camera.ui.activities.CaptureActivity}_
(see stack trace below)

The only installed camera app is the default [GrapheneOS Camera version 60](https://github.com/GrapheneOS/Camera/tree/60).

In com.bald.uriah.baldphone.views.home.HomePage1#[getCameraIntent](https://github.com/UriahShaulMandel/BaldPhone/blob/master/app/src/main/java/com/bald/uriah/baldphone/views/home/HomePage1.java#L170) setComponent is used with the package and class name: "app.grapheneos.camera", "app.grapheneos.camera.ui.activities.[CaptureActivity](https://github.com/GrapheneOS/Camera/blob/main/app/src/main/java/app/grapheneos/camera/ui/activities/CaptureActivity.kt)", which seems correct. Removing this and only use 
`return new Intent("android.media.action.IMAGE_CAPTURE");`
works.

Does setComponent (for explicit activity) have to be used?

The GrapheneOS Camera of course has the [IMAGE_CAPTURE](https://github.com/GrapheneOS/Camera/blob/60/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml#L115) action.

Tried the same app on another phone with LineageOS and it works. Maybe the problem is due to some security feature (or bug) in GrapheneOS.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Use GrapheneOS.
2. Start BaldPhone.
3. On the main menu, click the camera icon.
4. Error message: "An error has occured!"

**Expected behavior**
The camera app should start.

**Phone(please complete the following information, it can be found in the settings under Technical Information):**
 - API Level: 33
 - BaldPhone Version 14.0

**Additional context**
Stack trace:
```
2023-03-27 21:37:35.289 18319-18319 HomeScreenActivity      com.bald.uriah.baldphone             E  Unable to find explicit activity class {app.grapheneos.camera/app.grapheneos.camera.ui.activities.CaptureActivity}; have you declared this activity in your AndroidManifest.xml, or does your intent not match its declared <intent-filter>?
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  android.content.ActivityNotFoundException: Unable to find explicit activity class {app.grapheneos.camera/app.grapheneos.camera.ui.activities.CaptureActivity}; have you declared this activity in your AndroidManifest.xml, or does your intent not match its declared <intent-filter>?
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at android.app.Instrumentation.checkStartActivityResult(Instrumentation.java:2208)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at android.app.Instrumentation.execStartActivity(Instrumentation.java:1845)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at android.app.Activity.startActivityForResult(Activity.java:5553)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity.startActivityForResult(FragmentActivity.java:676)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at android.app.Activity.startActivityForResult(Activity.java:5472)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity.startActivityForResult(FragmentActivity.java:663)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at android.app.Activity.startActivity(Activity.java:6009)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at com.bald.uriah.baldphone.activities.HomeScreenActivity.startActivity(HomeScreenActivity.java:426)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at android.app.Activity.startActivity(Activity.java:5976)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at com.bald.uriah.baldphone.views.home.HomePage1.lambda$genOnClickListeners$7$HomePage1(HomePage1.java:222)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at com.bald.uriah.baldphone.views.home.-$$Lambda$HomePage1$ZCBRbqhTH87LgsvWFzPw5DXBtec.onClick(Unknown Source:2)
2023-03-27 21:37:35.290 18319-18319 System.err              com.bald.uriah.baldphone             W  	at com.bald.uriah.baldphone.views.BaldFrameLayoutButton.onClick(BaldFrameLayoutButton.java:139)
```

title: Android 13 restricted setting for notification
author: aha999
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Installing baldphone in Android 13 from stores that are not google play will restrict a setting for notification access, so you need to bypass it but users don't know that.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
add informational text to the "grant all permissions" menu under "enable notification access", that says where to do that.
maybe it could have 2 buttons under this option. one for app info menu to disable restriction, a second button would still be the same.

more info: https://www.droidwin.com/android-13-restricted-settings-for-sideloaded-apps-how-to-bypass/

title: Colored notification bell
author: woheller69
body:

It is hard to notice that there is a notification.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
I suggest to have the notification bell icon colored, maybe blue or magenta. And maybe increase saturation the more notifications are there.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

title: Add tutorial videos from local files / folders?
author: n3phtys
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
-
The tutorial videos are somehow by principle the best idea, but completely useless for two reasons: a) they're not translated (and they're also not easily translateable because they are not script generated), and b) they are integrated as embedded video streams, making it horrible to use if you have bad connection or little battery left.
Still, they're just there, and confuse users who do not aspect Hebrew content without warning.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
-
In ascending order of usefulness but also work:

1. Add a configuration to hide the videos alltogether.
2. Make them replaceable by configuration with a folder. We already have a way to watch local video files inside the app (so both widgets + permissions are already there) - allow users to configure a folder on the storage to pull video files from instead. If the file names are URL encoded labels, this could work pretty well and would stay compliant with Windows File Explorer. I could also use file sync solutions like Dropbox or others to synchronize those videos to my grandparents after handmaking them. Additionally this works pretty synergistic with the built-in Android screen recorder feature - I can not only show my grandparents how to use their phone to do something, I can also record myself and put it into their launcher, easy to reach. And they can share videos via messenger if they want to.
3. Replace the videos with autogenerated files. We could use CI/CD builds with emulators + screen cap (so even the shown UI is localized), and use TTS to generate the audio from a list of subtitle files. It can be run every major update. This obviously generates a giant batch of data (every video with every language), but it's not that much, especially when still uploading to youtube.


I strongly prefer the second option - it follows the Unix way of allowing us to use other apps to pull the files from, and is a nice way to add heavily customized videos, specific to one single user. It's also not that much work. By default you can still the original YT videos that are pretty well-made (just very useless in most countries).




As for video streams / YouTube in general: I recommend making them downloadable video files instead - that way the app size stays the same compared to embedding them within the APK, but someone could just download the video files in case of need (this is obviously not the main issue, but I was thinking about it when scribbling solutions).


**Additional context**
Issue https://github.com/UriahShaulMandel/BaldPhone/issues/925 is definitely similar to the first solutions.

title: Switch from Telegram to Matrix (Or bridge the Matix Channel with Telegram)
author: natrius
body:
I would suggest switching from Telegram to Matrix, something thats really open source. As i guess there are quite some people on telegram and not everybody wants to switch, its possible to bridge to the telegram Channel. 
A channel was already created by me and i can bridge to your telegram-channel if you are willing to. 

Matrix https://www.matrix.org/ is a Protocol and the current suggested messenger is https://element.io/ although it has some UI issues. Some people may prefer https://fluffychat.im/ as client as its more messenger like so its easier to switch. 

The channel i created is #Baldphone:matrix.org (unfortunately #baldphone:matrix.org was already taken). https://app.element.io/#/room/#Baldphone:matrix.org is possible to take as a direct-link :)

Best regards

title: Show date selection in recent calls
author: aha999
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Currently you have to manually search and scroll for dates at when the calls were made

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A toggle setting, that enables you to click on days/dates in recent canns and a pop-up window with calendar/day selection would show. Clicking on a date would scroll you to that section.

title: Minimized call notification - prompt
author: aha999
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
When calls are made, sometimes the caller screen gets minimized into the notification area and it is very confusing and complicated for some to open that and end the call.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
If a caller screen gets minimized, have some sort of pop-up indicator that shows an active call and clicking it would open the caller screen or have the end call option.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Create a baldphone caller screen suitable for elderly that would be integrated or have a home screen area expand that shows an active call.

title: First impressions and feedback (ideas/screenshots inside)
author: K0media
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Yes. There are features lacking for many things, probably for the future 2.0 major update of the App.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
It's my first time with Bald Phone and I have some thoughts on it. Please see the screenshots below.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
I come from Nova Launcher. But for some reason, my mom (who's a 70 years old elder) really liked as the first install. I'll post some ideas and feedback to help on the development for future updates.

**Additional context**

1. **Export/Import/Backup/Share/Sync settings** of the app and/or a **web gallery with** (public) available **presets** to be downloaded _for general purposes._

Tip: it could be hosted on GitHub repo or something.

I really miss this one. After all, _Bald Phone Settings will be lost if I reset_ the device _or clear the app settings_/uninstall it. 🤷‍♂️

2.1. Be able to enter "customization" mode to long press items to rearrange them
2.2. Option/Setting to tap (or long press) the clock and go directly to the Alarm/Clock/Timer screen (that can require some extra designing and coding), similar to [Google's Clock App.](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.deskclock)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144160143-fbe666a2-2249-4fab-8a1d-f183f74fcab1.png)

3. Word wrap is cluttering the long translated text. Could that be fixed?
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144160232-e34e8c17-e23b-4c4e-aa24-b08951b501a3.png)

4. Same for this one.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144160305-5911be1b-2e4a-44b0-ab33-4ba443e53054.png)

5. Be able to search contacts by T9 text (similar to what common dialers have, like Google Phone or any other dialer, mainly)
(See `#18` screenshot)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144160385-9149d51b-fea7-4b7b-a0aa-81f3e1280df5.png)

6. Be able to enter "editing/Customization" mode to long and drag/drop items to rearrange them in the shortcuts screen.
6.1. In the bottom of the screen, there could be "intuitive" icons to demonstrate the user on what pane he is. (Example: Notepad/cogwheel/house/shortcuts)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144160466-18296f8b-2fa8-4e43-9b23-c8b5f0e500c3.png)

7.1.  There's a typo in the word "Whatsapp"
7.2. Be able to customize the apps to be opened with (not only Wpp and SMS... Telegram, Insta DM, Facebook, etc)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144160853-567408cf-c32a-455a-95dd-6cf1a709a928.png)

8. The search mode won't match diacritic characters. (Example: if I search "emilia", it won't find or match "Emília", accented or special characters)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144160966-9b12179c-7a87-4edd-a3dd-d31ffc9826ce.png)

9. This translation looks wrong... It's written "Save" instead of "Edit". I can check that if you want.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161073-a505edad-206f-4b79-98f5-4c6203f31869.png)

10. The SOS screen only show contacts in alphabetical order. Can we customize that by long pressing and drag/drop them?
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161134-f82d26a2-542b-4a86-b080-4475c5a58a0c.png)

11. Can we set a background photo? Or should it remain as is to avoid elderly confusion? My mom asked if a background photo could be set to be seen, like a family picture or landscape.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161199-8e34037d-7f5f-4357-8569-89082d4e508e.png)

12. Again, I tried to find a contact with an accented character, but no matches. I'd recommend you to take a look at Telegram mobile's source code.
Additionally, the favorite contacts could remain on top.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161260-5ed3a966-c232-42d4-9a9a-8875c707dda3.png)

13. Again word wrap is cutting the text in a line.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161338-8aa30faf-6f6e-401b-97f8-7792601f9fa1.png)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161390-577dc547-a4d2-491a-98a2-5c81c7689573.png)
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161512-328f8c48-e964-42a6-9ad2-6cdf1182229e.png)

14. This time there's a match for the search without diacritic/accented character.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161456-6748afb0-ec04-4f15-aeb5-bab069bf6257.png)

15. The brightness control could be in the Launcher.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161660-b950cd16-cf5c-409c-9081-6d15ab18dbd4.png)

**My Suggestion: To place a brightness button with 3 or 4 levels of brightness instead of a slider. (Low/Mid/Full)**
That could avoid confusion from elders.

Each time you tapped the brightness button it would change its layout. Maybe an interactive Sun icon or a text below it.

16. **Awesome suggestion:** Google Photos has terrific face recognition algorithms. I'd suggest to try to inherit/link the phonebook contacts directly from the Google Photos app library.

I asked Google and other people about it, but they didn't return relevant answers regarding it.

Notice: I'm not quite sure if their API allow it, but it would be brilliant to have in an easy way to recognize people on the Contacts/Dialer of Bald Phone.
Please check if you can do that. 👍🏻
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161747-88903956-662d-442a-b784-ea1dddcd40a6.png)

17. This is the T9 search I talked about in the `#4` screenshot. Please check if you can add that.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161821-5532e691-eb19-4f5b-b954-7b2abaa64969.png)

18. As you can see the giant clock on the top of the screen, it shows the current date and even time forecast.

I don't mind much about the time forecast, but I believe the current date (in a customizable way, check out an app called _Digital Clock Xperia_) is essential for users.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144161930-32a18d0f-c147-4e4d-afef-1b2ca8a65865.png)

19. Google Apps usually have that alphabetical slider. I wanted that to be featured in Bald Phone too.

But I saw that there's a different approach to search apps and contacts in it, like an old-school phonebook. But I think the sidebar with the letters would be nice too.

I also like the way Nova Launcher has implemented it with the recent/top apps in the top bar, so think about that, okay?
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144162000-754956dc-d0ae-4432-9678-c3ff5b1fd5f4.png)

20. I believe searching contacts like this could be nice too.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144162070-8bb49c8e-a57c-46c7-88df-640cbdee4688.png)

21. Could we have more famous apps stock icons for the main Launcher pane?
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144162172-55b556f9-6952-4d15-9cf2-23a3bf169282.png)

22. Can we also be able to rename the main page/menu/shortcuts apps and items labels? For example, my mom uses GuitarTuna, but she knows only as much as "Afinador" ("Tuner"), so I'd like to change that to make it easier for her.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144162231-1d49b2a1-9b3a-4efc-95f3-ed71502eda71.png)

23. Can we **set a default web browser (or other main apps)** to avoid submenus like this? My mom uses only Chrome, so that one below is useless for her.

If we could set up a single internet browser, it could be better for quick access.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144162330-4e17e8a2-1c72-48d0-be9d-54551467dd2f.png)

24. Implement a simple and intuitive calendar view (just like those wall calendars people gift in big stores, optionally), with birthday or Google Calendar "inheriting" support (for annotated dates, local holidays, etc, maybe syncing to Google Calendar, who knows).

25. Add/allow long press interactive additional actions, like Nova Launcher (and other launchers) and Sesame Shortcuts do.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144170556-85a7c2e2-4ef9-4db6-a0be-b7cd9e67ccfa.png)

26. Add a setting to sort (most of) entries by frequently or recently used (similar to Nova Launcher's).
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/22375465/144173372-45dc08cb-f65c-4ded-bf34-3bc3848f55e7.png)


**Other relevant issues to be mentioned**
1. #26 
2. #52 
3. #221 
4. #183 
5. #124 
6. #153 
7. #218 
8. #140 
9. #48 (done)
10. #744 
11. #280 
12. #250 
13. #297 
14. #5 
15. #66 
16. #12 
17. #79 
18. #37 
19. #286 
20. #158 

That's it for now. I'll update the post if I have more relevant ideas.

Thank you. 🙏🏻

title: Add color to SMS and CALL butrons in contacts
author: aha999
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Currently the main features of contact viewer are call and send sms, but they're the same color as other buttons so are harder to see.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Change color of sms button to yellow and the color of call button to green (at least in more colors mode)

**Additional context**
 I believe it would be much easier for elderly to recognize these buttons by color and use them faster.

Screenshot:
![Screenshot_20211126-025344884 (1).jpg](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/50620416/143518749-7eba5221-bc37-419f-8bd7-200c217358c6.jpg)

title: Reorder favorites
author: aha999
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Currently we can't reorder the positions of favourite shortcuts and contacts on a home screen.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
It would be nice to have some sort of prioritization feature like an option to reorder favourites on a home screen. It could be done from bandphone settings.

**Additional context**
An 75 year old sir asked me how to reorder these, so i thought that was a good idea for a feature. Only if they knew how to use github.

title: app drawer | Pin apps to top
author: aha999
body:
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Currently there is a lot of apps in the app drawer and you usually have to sort through many to get to the ones that you actually use.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Ads an option to pin the apps in the app-drawer as favourites to the top, separared by a thin line from other apps

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
I think that the most elegant solution would be to do that in the settings, not in the app drawer context menu when clicking apps, to keep it clutter free.

**Additional context**
This way users, especially eldery could avoid a lot of confusion and app searching in the app drawer.

title: Add a screen for system toggles such as bluetooth, data, wi-fi, airplane mode, etc.
author: TSnatch72
body:
My father struggles a lot with the toggles panel on every phone he's had and he usually turns off the data or turns on the bluetooth by accident, draining the battery, so i propose a screen dedicated to quick access to said toggles.

I know making shortcut for every toggle an app may add is difficult, but maybe it can be done for the most common ones, such as:

- Bluetooth
- Wi-fi
- Data
- wi-fi hotspot
- sound, silent and dnd modes
- Airplane mode
- Battery save mode
- blue light filter/night mode/reading mode
- dark mode
- Screencast
- flashlight

Some of this already exist in the main screen indeed, but i see no harm in giving the user the option to also add them to this toggles screen. 

**Additional context**
The user should also have the option to customize and rearrange the layout and which toggles to add and which to remove

An example of this proposed screen would be this screenshot from a playstore propietary launcher called easy mode (it doesn't actually function well, honestly)
![Example](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/88058182/140660475-7b686135-39a4-4f90-aea3-02e4d3bf2cc7.jpg)

title: Add sos as app which can be pinned
author: UriahShaulMandel
